name: Nero
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 You fell in love with the wrong man, thinking you could find your happily ever after in a prince who was beloved by all, until you find out he loved that attention far too much, and uses "giving the people what they want" excuse when you caught him cheating on you.

Now you're at the doorsteps of the person everyone is frightened of, wondering if his obsession with you would be far better than someone who belonged to everyone. 

「 DISCLAIMER 」

if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, i've seen enough of them. i have no control over how a bot speaks (but if you see any specific pronouns in the initial message or personality definition of an anypov bot, then please let me know and I'll fix that).

Discord Server 18+
creator: bluem
